---
title: "Local Fluree setup"
author: "Christiaan Pauw, Tshepo Sotiya, Jaco Human"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    code_folding: show
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Purpose and scope of this document

This document ....

# Download Docker image


```{r message=FALSE}
library(rjson)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(tibble)
library(plyr)
library(novaRush)

Sys.setenv(fluree_link = "http://localhost:8090/fdb/") # "http://localhost:8091/fluree"
Sys.setenv(privateKey = "0c7ebd0dcbdb5796ff0175757724cffeaa948794dc0cb649b2eb525e9e70e6cb")
Sys.setenv(authId = "Tf8yFnwVxvekbvwXwsEzgwUVz4YBZMgjHEL")
```

Check if the network exists

```{r}
system("docker network ls", intern = TRUE)
```
